creator: ido@hitachi-ms.co.jp
text:
Update of net/delegate port from 6.1.15 to 6.1.16.

About files/delegated.sh
- MANAGER is obsoleted.
- -T is 'trace system calls' option. -Txt will make loggin terse
 (from Manual.htm).

Fix: PORTNAME=      delegate
-PORTVERSION=   6.1.15
+PORTVERSION=   6.1.16
 CATEGORIES=    net www japanese
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://etlport.etl.go.jp/pub/DeleGate/
+MASTER_SITES=  \
+       ftp://ftp.delegate.org/pub/DeleGate/ \
+       ftp://ftp.etl.go.jp/pub/DeleGate/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=    max@FreeBSD.org
